arts.ttl: Real Madrid eye Cambiaso as Carvajal replacement: Player and Juventus stance revealed
arts.sum: Real Madrid have set their sights on Juventus defender Andrea Cambiaso as a potential replacement for the injured Dani Carvajal, according to reports from Tuttosport (via IlBianconero). The Spanish giants have been impressed by Cambiaso’s recent performances, particularly his showing for Italy against Belgium, which has further cemented his status as a key player for both Juventus and the national team. Cambiaso’s rise to prominence has not gone unnoticed across Europe, with several clubs expressing interest in the versatile fullback during the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Marc Cucurella takes bizarre dig at Cole Palmer and reveals his Chelsea team-mate's one flaw
arts.sum: Chelsea star Marc Cucrella took a cheeky swipe at superstar teammate Cole Palmer over his appearance but believes England international is destined to 'be among the best'.

arts.ttl: Spain vs Denmark: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: European champions Spain continue their 2024/25 UEFA Nations League campaign on Saturday evening when they host Denmark. Spain have a whole host of their Euro 2024-winning squad unavailable to them, including Rodri, Dani Carvajal, Dani Olmo and Nico Williams who all miss out through injury.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal ‘touched by the wand of God’, says Spain boss
arts.sum: Barcelona winger Lamine Yamal has impressed Spain head coach Luis de la Fuente so comprehensively that the boss of La Roja says the 17-year-old has been “touched by the wand of God” – yet he still has a warning for the superstar. Lamine Yamal ‘touched by the wand of God’, says Spain boss

arts.ttl: Spain boss: Clubs' responsibility to rest players
arts.sum: Spain coach Luis de la Fuente says the onus should be on clubs to rest players, not national teams, amid an increase in injuries across European football.

arts.ttl: Will Real Madrid enter the January transfer window to find a substitute for Carvajal?
arts.sum: It couldn’t have been a more untimely setback for the player, who is in the final year of his contract - and Ancelotti, who is left without his first-choice right-back as Madrid battle for seven trophies this season for the first time in club history. The first message sent out by the club was unequivocal: “ There will be no signings in the winter transfer market, that’s why Lucas Vázquez was renewed and there is full confidence in him.”

arts.ttl: AC Milan’s January transfer plans: From Chukwuemeka to a “New Morata”
arts.sum: AC Milan are looking to bolster their squad in the January transfer window after a challenging start to the season. Currently sitting sixth in Serie A with 11 points from seven matches, the Rossoneri are keen to strengthen key areas to support new manager Paulo Fonseca’s vision. Calciomercato report that the club’s primary focus appears to be on the right-back position, with captain Davide Calabria’s future uncertain. With his contract expiring in June 2025 and renewal talks stalled, Milan is exploring alternatives. arts.ttl: Carvajal, Rodri injuries show top players have too many games. Are national teams to blame?
arts.sum: Spain's first home game since winning Euro 2024 will see them without two of their captains, Dani Carvajal and Rodri, due to long-term injuries caused by burnout. Is there a way to fix this mess?
